description: Rajat Patidar's explosive 93 not out against Gujarat Titans propelled Royal Challengers Bengaluru to a record IPL playoff total. His fearless batting, including a remarkable backfoot six off Kagiso Rabada, earned high praise from Ravichandran Ashwin, who hailed it as a potential shot of the tournament. Patidar's dominant display has elevated his captaincy and batting credentials significantly.

Cloudflare lays off 1,100 employees; CEO says company isn’t struggling
description: Cloudflare is laying off over 1,100 employees, about 20% of its workforce, to restructure around AI adoption. CEO Matthew Prince explained the cuts target 'measurers' – roles like middle management and operations – as AI enhances efficiency. He believes AI will boost productivity for 'builders' and 'sellers', allowing greater investment in growth areas.

title: Quote of the day: The formula Federer used every time life left him 'stuck in hole'
description: Roger Federer’s reflection on adversity captures the mindset that defined his career and comeback. After injury setbacks and doubts over his future, Federer returned stronger, proving resilience can reshape failure into growth. His message extends far beyond tennis, arguing that difficult periods, whether in sport, work or life, often force the reinvention, patience and discipline that ultimately make people stronger than before.

To avoid Rajasthan-like crisis, Congress opts for compromise over disruption in Karnataka
description: The Congress high command is reportedly seeking a compromise to avoid a Rajasthan-like political crisis in Karnataka by potentially replacing Chief Minister Siddaramaiah with Deputy CM DK Shivakumar. The party aims to manage competing power centers and caste equations carefully to prevent factional instability and protect its electoral prospects in 2028.

title: Happy Eid-ul-Adha 2026: Top 100 Eid Mubarak wishes and quotes for Bakrid
description: Navigating the flurry of Eid-ul-Adha greetings can be overwhelming. This guide offers 100 ready-to-use messages, from heartfelt family wishes and foodie friend prompts to professional greetings and quick replies.

title: Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta staff has 2 promises for survivors
description: Mark Zuckerberg's goodbye memo to 8,000 fired Meta employees on May 20 doubled as a message to the 70,000 staff still standing. The Meta CEO made two promises: no further company-wide layoffs in 2026, and better communication after weeks of internal anxiety. The memo lands as Meta funnels $125-145 billion into AI infrastructure, shifts 7,000 staff to AI projects, and cancels 6,000 open roles.
